converging_vocabularies.status: STRONG_DEBUT — first test, requires 2-3 more sessions to confirm

physical_law_constraint_TUR.description: Using TUR inequality as hard mathematical constraint bounding CV from below. Not a model — a necessary condition.
physical_law_constraint_TUR.note: Highest-scoring bridge type this session. Constraint-based bridges survive adversarial critique because the inequality cannot be violated.

DNA_topology_N_eff_modulation.description: Supercoiling state modulates accessible DnaA binding sites → effective counting N_eff.

kinetic_timing_window_U_shaped.description: Bidirectional sensitivity: both under- and over-tuning of a kinetic reset mechanism increases noise.

dual_bound_comparison_TUR_vs_BPL.description: Comparing two physical bounds (TUR and Berg-Purcell) for the same biological sensor to determine which is tighter.
dual_bound_comparison_TUR_vs_BPL.note: Primary experiment fatally flawed (DnaA L366K cannot initiate). Secondary tests valid. Redesign required.

multi_current_coupled_TUR.description: Multi-subsystem TUR decomposition: each molecular machine contributes to total noise portfolio with its own efficiency ratio.
multi_current_coupled_TUR.note: Independence assumption challenged by DnaA-FtsZ STRING 0.920 coupling.

pareto_frontier_extension.description: Extending Pareto-frontier analysis (Fei & Bhatt 2015) to predict bifurcation coincidence quantitatively.
pareto_frontier_extension.note: Citation error (Barato & Seifert: PRX 2016 not PRL 2017). Qualitative direction partially published.

spatial_gradient_diffusion.description: Spatial DnaA-ATP gradient maintained by CL/PG membrane lipid enrichment at cell poles.
spatial_gradient_diffusion.kill_reason: DnaA D~3 μm²/s equilibrates across 2 μm cell in <1s. Cell cycle operates on minutes. Pe~0.002. Gradient physically impossible without active maintenance.

cross_species_scaling_assumption.kill_reason: V. cholerae Chr2 uses RctB not DnaA; species-specific regulatory circuits differ beyond box count; DnaA box count error.

mechanism_wrong_ppGpp.kill_reason: ppGpp inhibits via DNA supercoiling (Fernández-Coll 2020), not DnaA level reduction as hypothesized.

citation_misuse_opposite_conclusion.kill_reason: Campos 2014 cited as evidence Caulobacter uses SIZER; paper explicitly demonstrates ADDER.

quantitative_impossibility_diffusion.description: Péclet number Pe~0.002. DnaA diffusion homogenizes gradient in <1s. Same argument independently applied in Cycle 2 critique and QG.

mechanism_wrong.description: Primary mechanism misidentified. ppGpp acts via supercoiling, not DnaA level reduction.

citation_misuse.description: Real paper cited for opposite conclusion. Campos 2014 proves adder, cited as sizer.

compound_factual_errors.description: Multiple compounding errors: wrong organism initiator (RctB not DnaA), inflated box count, species-diversity ignored.

logic_kill_internal_contradiction.description: Hypothesis predicted near-zero WT memory (f=0.007) while claiming to explain Susman 2025 substantial nonlinear memory. Internal inconsistency + RIDA dispensability (PNAS 2024).

new_pipeline_insights.description: Computational Validator's N_eff=20 events was misinterpreted by Generator as 20 DnaA boxes (actual: 11). Error propagated to 3 cycle-1 hypotheses simultaneously.
new_pipeline_insights.recommendation: Computational Validator must explicitly distinguish: (a) physical binding site count [cite primary paper], (b) events per cycle [state assumptions], (c) TUR parameter N_eff [state formula context]. Generator must cross-verify counting parameters against primary literature independently.

new_pipeline_insights.insight: Péclet number as spatial gradient kill criterion
new_pipeline_insights.description: For passive diffusion in E. coli (D=1-5 μm²/s, L=2 μm), Pe=v·L/D ~0.002 << 1. Any spatial gradient washes out in <1s. Cell cycle operates on minutes.
new_pipeline_insights.recommendation: Add Pe check to standard quantitative verification. For any spatial gradient hypothesis: Pe = v·L/D. If Pe << 1 without active confinement mechanism, gradient is physically impossible.

new_pipeline_insights.insight: Physical law as bridge concept outperforms physical model as bridge concept
new_pipeline_insights.description: TUR inequality is a hard constraint, not a model. Hypotheses using inequalities (TUR, Poincaré-Hopf) survive critique because the constraint cannot be violated — only quantified or approached.
new_pipeline_insights.recommendation: Scout: search for field pairs where Field A has proven mathematical inequalities that must hold for any system of Field C's type. Generator: lead with the inequality statement before mechanism. The bound is unfalsifiable; the near-optimality claim is what gets tested.

new_pipeline_insights.insight: Citation misuse distinct from citation hallucination
new_pipeline_insights.description: H6 cited Campos 2014 for opposite conclusion (adder cited as sizer). Paper exists, content is accurate, but conclusion attributed is wrong.
new_pipeline_insights.recommendation: Generator: when a paper title or abstract suggests a result, verify the actual main conclusion explicitly. Quality Gate: check not just paper existence but paper conclusion alignment with cited claim.

new_pipeline_insights.insight: Genthon 2026 preprint threatens TUR intrinsic noise decompositions
new_pipeline_insights.description: arxiv:2601.05193 shows extrinsic noise dominates E. coli cell size variability. This makes intrinsic TUR decompositions (comparing DnaA vs FtsZ intrinsic noise) potentially unmeasurable in practice.
new_pipeline_insights.recommendation: For TUR×bacterial cell biology: design experiments that either (a) separate intrinsic from extrinsic noise experimentally, or (b) use predictions robust to extrinsic dominance (structural comparisons like ~1840× ratio remain valid regardless of noise partition).

disjointness_update.S014_confirmation: DISJOINT (0.96 confidence, 0 TUR-adder papers in PubMed verified). Confirms DISJOINT preference.

creativity_metrics.trend_vs_previous: RESTORED — S013 (1.5/1.5/2.0) → S014 (2.0/1.7/2.6). Physics×biology bridge restores disciplinary distance after within-life-sciences session.
creativity_metrics.note: converging_vocabularies for physics×biology pairs produces consistent disciplinary distance of 2.0 and novelty type of 2.6-3.0 (new framework connecting fields).

session_meta_insights: converging_vocabularies strategy (physics×biology via shared mathematical vocabulary): 87.5% PASS+COND rate at QG — strongest debut of any new strategy
Physical law as bridge concept (TUR inequality) outperforms physical model as bridge: constraint-based hypotheses survive adversarial critique because bounds are mathematically necessary

Computational phase error propagation: ambiguous Computational Validator output can cascade errors to 3+ simultaneous hypotheses — distinguish binding site count from events per cycle from TUR parameter N_eff

Diffusion physics kill (Péclet number): for passive diffusion in E. coli (D~3 μm²/s, L=2 μm), Pe~0.002 — spatial gradients are impossible without active maintenance; add Pe check to quantitative validation
Cross-cycle learning works: ppGpp kill (H5, wrong mechanism) → correct mechanism (Fernández-Coll 2020) named by Critic → successful reformulation (C2-H2 COND) in Cycle 2

Genthon 2026 preprint (extrinsic noise dominance) threatens entire class of TUR intrinsic noise decompositions — design experiments that separate intrinsic from extrinsic or use structural comparisons robust to noise partition
Citation misuse (real paper, wrong conclusion attributed) is a distinct kill mode from citation hallucination — verify paper's MAIN CONCLUSION, not just its existence

Parallel filter-bank: MSL2/3/9/10 variants as frequency-selective detectors
